Scenario: Verify existing Account Billing Address and Payment Terms are populated under the Details tab
Expected Result: Fields present → pass; fields empty → console.warn soft-fail, test continues

Scenario: Create a new Contact directly on the Account record via the Contacts related list
Expected Result: Contact is created and visible as a link in the Account's Contacts related list

Scenario: Create a new Opportunity from the Contact record via the Opportunities related list
Expected Result: Opportunity is saved and its record detail page opens with the correct name

Scenario: Verify newly created Contact is listed as the Primary Contact Role on the Opportunity
Expected Result: Contact appears in the Contact Roles related list; Primary indicator is confirmed true
